adonis-spritz.name: Adonis Spritz
instructions: Pour sherry and vermouth into an old-fashioned or rocks glass filled with ice, followed by club soda. Top with bitters and garnish with orange twist.

air-fryer-baklava-english-muffin.name: Air Fryer Baklava English Muffin
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 191°C (190°C).

Make the baklava English muffin:  In a small bowl, mix together the walnuts, pistachios, melted butter, brown sugar, and honey with a spoon until well combined. Split open the English muffin and spread the nut mixture evenly on top of each English muffin half.
Air fry for 3-5 minutes, until golden and crispy.
Meanwhile, make the whipped vanilla cream: In a medium bowl, beat together the heavy cream, powdered sugar, and vanilla with a hand mixer until soft peaks form.
Remove the English muffin from the air fryer and serve warm with a dollop of whipped vanilla cream and a drizzle of honey.
Enjoy!

air-fryer-popcorn-chicken.name: Air Fryer Popcorn Chicken
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic powder. In a separate medium bowl, whisk together the eggs and buttermilk. Add the panko to a third medium bowl.

Season the chicken cubes with salt and pepper. Dip 1 piece of chicken at a time in the flour mixture, making sure to fully coat each piece and shaking off any excess. Dip the chicken in the egg mixture. Then, coat the chicken in the panko. Repeat with remaining chicken.
Preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200°C). Spray the basket with nonstick spray.

Working in batches, arrange the chicken in the basket, making sure the pieces are not touching. Cook until light golden, 5 minutes, then flip the chicken over and continue cooking until cooked through and golden brown, 5 minutes more. Repeat with the remaining chicken.
Serve the popcorn chicken with ketchup.
Enjoy!

albanian-leg-recipe-lezzet.name: Albanian Leg Recipe

ingredients.item: Instead of chicken, you can use the chopped cheek.
Instead of yogurt, you can get more eaten by prefering cottage yogurt.
You can increase the flavor using chicken water.
You can prepare a different presentation by adding garlic yogurt to the car.

alheira-de-mirandela-teleculinaria.name: Alheira De Mirandela
instructions: Dispose of the rugs on a tray, pick them up with a fork and put them in the oven, preheated at 180oC, until they are baked. Remove and reserve. Cook the cabbage in salt-tempered water. Drain and reserve too.

Bring to the fire a pot with the cloves of chopped garlic, the oil and the fat of the darkeners, which formed on the board, and let it shine. Add the split cabbage and cowpea, wrap and let cook for 5 minutes.
Remove the codea from the broa and undo the brain. Add to the previous preparation, mix and refine the seasonings of salt and pepper. Remove from the fire and serve with the dark circles.

almond-you-must-be-nuts-crackers.name: Almond 'you Must Be Nuts!' Crackers
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Mix almond flour, walnuts, flax seed meal, and salt together in a bowl until well combined. Add water and olive oil; mix until dough is moist and holds together.

Turn dough onto the prepared baking sheet. Place a second piece of parchment over the dough and use a rolling pin to roll it into a 1/16-inch-thick rectangle. Remove the top piece of parchment and cut the sides of dough to make an even rectangle. Add excess dough to corners or one end of the rectangle and re-roll to a uniform thickness.
Cut dough into 1-inch squares using a pizza cutter, keeping dough still attached.
Bake in the preheated oven until the outside edges of dough are browned, about 15 minutes. Cool crackers on the baking sheet, then break into squares.

almond-milk-recipe-comedera.name: Almond Milk Recipe
almond-milk-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de leche de almendras casera
instructions: In a bowl with leaked water, pour the almonds and let them moist for 4 hours.
Remove the almonds, rinse them well and place them in the blender with 6 cups of water. Licoa till there are complete almonds and the mixture looks creamy.
With the help of a blanket of sky, put the liquid onto a bowl or large bowl. Once you have the whole pulp in the blanket, press to get out all the fluids.
Keep your milk in an airtight container. Serve and enjoy.

and-corn-on-the-cob.name: And Corn On The Cob
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil; stir in sugar until dissolved. Add corn; cover the pot. Turn off the heat, leaving the pot on the hot burner; steep corn in hot water until tender, about 25 minutes. Drain.

and-lemon-pineapple-dessert.name: And Lemon Pineapple Dessert

ingredients.prep: sugar-free lemon pudding mix (such as Jell-O®)

instructions: Combine vanilla yogurt, lemon yogurt, pineapple, and pudding mix in a bowl; stir until well combined. Fold in whipped topping.
Spoon mixture into 4 dessert dishes, and chill for about 30 minutes.
Garnish each dessert with a blueberry, toasted coconut, or an additional dollop of the whipped topping, if desired.

and-pretzel-bites-with-nutella-dipping-s.name: And Pretzel Bites With Nutella® Dipping Sauce
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Unroll pizza crust and cut into 2-inch squares. Roll each square into a ball and place on a cookie sheet.

Bring 3 quarts of water to a boil. Stir in baking soda until dissolved. Add pizza balls to the boiling water in batches. Cook until puffed up and floating, 1 to 2 minutes. Transfer to a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper. Sprinkle salt on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 10 to 12 minutes.

Mix Neufchatel cheese, chocolate-hazelnut spread, and milk together to make chocolate dipping sauce. Add more milk for a thinner dip. Mix mustard and honey together in a separate bowl. Serve warm pretzel bites with dipping sauces.

and-vegetable-soup.name: And Vegetable Soup
instructions: Combine tomatoes, chicken broth, tomato juice, carrots, celery, potato, green beans, corn, and water in a large stockpot. Season with salt, pepper, and Creole seasoning.
Bring to a boil over medium heat and simmer until vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
Serve hot and enjoy!

angel-hair-bibimguksu.name: Angel Hair Bibimguksu

ingredients.item: (226 grams) very thinly sliced green cabbage

instructions: Whisk ½ cup (176 grams) gochujang, ½ cup maesil cheong (plum extract syrup), ¼ cup tuna extract sauce, ¼ cup distilled white vinegar, ¼ cup toasted sesame oil, 3 Tbsp. minced garlic, 3 Tbsp. sugar, and 2 Tbsp. gochugaru together in a large bowl; set aside.

Bring 2½ quarts water to a boil in a large, wide pot. Add 12 oz. (340 grams) angel hair pasta and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 4 minutes. Drain the noodles and rinse under cold running water until chilled. Drain and gently squeeze the noodles to remove excess liquid.

Add the pasta, 2 Persian cucumbers (160 grams), cut into 3" matchsticks, and two-thirds of 4 cups (226 grams) very thinly sliced green cabbage, to the bowl with the sauce. Using your gloved hands, gently toss the mixture until the noodles and vegetables are evenly coated with the sauce. Divide the pasta among individual serving bowls. Spoon any sauce left in the mixing bowl around the pasta, then sprinkle with 4 tsp. sesame seeds, toasted. Top with the remaining 1 Persian cucumber (80 grams), cut into 3‑inch matchsticks, remaining one-third of 4 cups (226 grams) very thinly sliced green cabbage, and 2 or 3 hard-boiled large eggs, halved. Serve with lemon wedges.

any-berry-lemon-ricotta-cake.name: Any-berry Lemon Ricotta Cake

ingredients.prep: raspberries, blueberries, or halved or quartered hulled strawberries (about 8 oz.)

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Brush a 9"-diameter cake pan with extra-virgin olive oil. Line bottom with a parchment paper round. Combine 1⅓ cups blackberries, raspberries, blueberries, or halved or quartered hulled strawberries and 2 Tbsp. (25 g) sugar in a medium bowl. Using a fork, mash together until sugar is hydrated and no dry spots remain. There will be some totally smashed berries, but some should still be intact. Set berry mixture aside.
Whisk 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1½ tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. baking soda in a medium bowl to combine. Set aside.

Place 1 Tbsp. (heaping) finely grated lemon zest and remaining 1 cup (200 g) sugar in a large bowl. Using your fingers, work lemon zest into sugar until sugar starts to clump and mixture is very fragrant. Add 3 large eggs, 2 tsp. vanilla extract, and remaining ½ cup extra-virgin olive oil and whisk vigorously until mixture is pale and smooth. Add juice of 1 large lemon and 8 oz. whole-milk fresh ricotta and mix just until combined. Add reserved dry ingredients and mix with a rubber spatula until incorporated and batter is mostly smooth.

Scrape batter into prepared pan and spoon reserved (now syrupy) berries on top. Bake cake until golden brown on top and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 45–50 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack; let cool in pan. Invert cake onto a large plate; peel away parchment and discard. Turn cake right side up.
Do ahead: Cake can be baked 2 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature.

apple-cake-in-a-jar.name: Apple Cake In A Jar
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Lightly grease the insides of 8 straight-sided, wide-mouth pint canning jars.
Sift flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a large bowl. Set aside.
Beat sugar and shortening together in a medium bowl until fluffy. Beat in eggs until well combined. Add flour mixture, alternating with water; mix until smooth. Fold in apples, raisins, and nuts.

Fill jars 1/2 full of batter; wipe off any batter that gets on the rims. Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 45 minutes. Meanwhile, sterilize the lids and rings in boiling water.

Remove jars from the oven one at a time; wipe rims with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw rings on tightly. Press the center of each lid with a finger to ensure the lid does not move up or down. If it doesn't move at all, it's sealed.
Cake should be eaten immediately, or cooled and refrigerated for up to one week.

apple-orchard-punch.name: Apple Orchard Punch
instructions: Combine apple juice, cranberry juice concentrate, and orange juice. Stir until dissolved; slowly add ginger ale.
Thinly slice apple horizontally. Float slices on top of punch.

apple-snack-dippers.name: Apple Snack Dippers
instructions: Combine the Greek yogurt, nuts, honey and cinnamon in a small bowl and mix to combine.
Serve with apple slices.
Enjoy!

apple-cheddar-rosemary-beignets.name: Apple-cheddar-rosemary Beignets

ingredients.prep: for frying and bowl; about 6 cups

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped peeled firm baking apple

instructions: Coarsely grate half of cheddar, then cut remaining cheddar into small pieces; set aside.

Combine milk, sugar, and yeast in the bowl of a stand mixer and let sit until it foams. Whisk in egg, egg yolk, and 2 Tbsp. honey. Add chopped rosemary, baking powder, kosher salt, and 3½ cups flour and mix on low speed with dough hook until incorporated and dough forms a ball around hook.

Increase mixer speed to medium and add butter a piece at a time, beating until completely incorporated before adding more. Mix until dough is smooth and starting to pull away from sides of bowl, 6–8 minutes. With motor running, gradually add grated cheese and mix until incorporated. Transfer to a large oiled bowl, cover, and let sit in a warm, draft-free spot until doubled in size, 1–2 hours.

Turn out dough onto a lightly floured surface and roll out to a 14" square. Scatter apples and chopped cheese evenly over dough and roll up into a log; gather log into a ball. Place back in bowl and let sit in a warm, draft-free spot until nearly doubled in size, 45–60 minutes.

Pour oil into a large heavy pot to come 2" up sides; fit pot with thermometer and heat oil over medium-high until thermometer registers 325°. Working in batches and using 2 spoons, carefully drop ovoid-shaped scoops of dough (about 3" long and 1" thick) into oil and cook, turning once, until deep golden brown all over, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack.
Fry rosemary sprigs, turning occasionally, until crisp, about 2 minutes; crumble over beignets. Drizzle generously with honey and sprinkle with sea salt.
Do Ahead: Dough (without cheddar pieces and apple) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover with plastic wrap and chill (do not let rise first).

aquavit-spritzer.name: Aquavit Spritzer
instructions: Combine sugar and 1 Tbsp. hot water in a pitcher. Stir to dissolve. Add preserves. Using a wooden spoon, stir to loosen preserves and mix with simple syrup. Gently stir in soda water and aquavit.
Fill tumblers with ice. Divide aquavit spritzer equally among glasses and garnish each with a lemon twist.

artichoke-omelet-recipe-for-a-good-break.name: Artichoke Omelet Recipe, For A Good Breakfast
artichoke-omelet-recipe-for-a-good-break.original_name: Receta de tortilla de alcachofas, para un buen desayuno

Once the artichokes have been peaked, we will add some lemon to them so that they do not get rusty as they tend to get bitter and dark.

Now we come with ham cut them into small squares or thin sheets.
Put up a frying pan and add olive oil, sock garlic and onion.
When transparent, add ham and mix very well.
We get our artichokes and we're gonna cut them with the thin sheets. We'll add them to the frying pan and we'll mix them up and get them integrated. Let them cook for 3 minutes.

Turn off the fire, remove the tortilla from the frying pan and serve on a plate.
Degusta!

artichoke-pate-recipe-comedera.name: Artichoke pâté recipe

ingredients.item: 200 gr de corazones de alcachofa (frescos o en conserva)
2 cdas de aceite de oliva extra virgen
50 gr de crema de leche o yogur griego natural
Sweet or hot pigment to decorate (optional)

instructions: Prepare artichokes: If you wear fresh, clear and remove hard leaves, cut his tiptoes and boil his hearts with salt water for 15- 20 minutes. If you put them in pallet, scrape them well.

Warm the olive oil into a frying pan and lightly pour the garlic up to golden and without burning.
In a processor, add artichokes, frying garlic, parmesan cheese, nuts and lemon juice. It processes to achieve a homogenous paste.
Add Greek milk cream or yogurt and re-process up to creamy texture.
Reapes salt and pepper to taste and puts into a bowl, decorates with pimenton and fresh parsley.
Refrigerate at least 30 minutes before serving.

arugula-salad-recipe-lezzet.name: Arugula Salad Recipe

You can choose regular tomato, turp slices, cucumber pickled or colorful buckthorn peppers instead of cherry tomatoes.

avocado oil instead of olive oil, walnut oil or sesame oil can be preferred.
Salt and pepper can be used instead of sea salt, pepper, water or spicy mixtures.

ingredients.item: 1/4 red onion (half ring chopped, rubbed with salt)

asparagus-leek-and-potato-soup.name: Asparagus, Leek, And Potato Soup

ingredients.prep: ends trimmed and stalks cut into small pieces
sliced, white parts only and thoroughly washed

instructions: Heat butter in a large soup pot over medium heat. Add asparagus, leeks, potatoes, shallot, and garlic; cook and stir until potatoes soft but not mushy, about 5 minutes.
Sprinkle flour over vegetables; stir until thoroughly coated, making sure not to burn them. Add warm water, chicken stock, and bouillon cube; bring to a simmer and cook for 20 to 25 minutes.

Carefully fill food processor or blender halfway with soup. Cover, remove feed tube pusher, cover feed tube with a potholder; pulse to desired consistency. Pour into a pot. Repeat with remaining soup. Ladle soup into bowls; garnish with sour cream, paprika, and pepper.

assorted-fish-cataplana-teleculinaria.name: Assorted Fish Cataplana

ingredients.item: 800 g  marisco e peixe variado para caldeirada
1 lata pequena  tomate pelado em cubos

instructions: After tomorrow, cut the fish into small pieces and mix with the shellfish. Season everything with chopped garlic teeth, sweet pepper, lemon juice, salt and pyri. Let it marinate for 20 minutes.
Peel and cut the onion into half-moons; cut the bacon into cubes. Heat the olive oil in a cataplana, add the onion and bacon and let it saute.
Then add the fish and shellfish and let cook very well, turning carefully with a tweezers.
Acrescente a polpa de tomate, o tomate pelado e o vinho branco. Disponha por cima um ramo de coentros, feche e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, durante 20 minutos. Retire do lume e sirva de imediato.

aunt-ros-baked-beans.name: Aunt Ro's Baked Beans
instructions: Cook bacon in a large, deep skillet over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain on paper towels; crumble and set aside. Discard grease.
Cook ground beef and onion in the same skillet over medium heat, stirring until beef is no longer pink, 5 to 7 minutes; drain. Transfer mixture to a slow cooker.
Stir butter beans, baked beans with pork, pinto beans, barbecue sauce, ketchup, and brown sugar into beef mixture to combine. Cover slow cooker. Cook on High for 4 hours. Top servings with bacon.

authentic-taralli.name: Authentic Taralli
instructions: Combine flour, 1/4 teaspoon salt, oil, and wine in a stand mixer. Mix ingredients using the paddle attachment until a ball forms. Switch to the dough hook and knead dough for 10 minutes.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Bring a large pot of water to boil over high heat and add the remaining salt. Spread a large, clean cloth out on a counter or table.

Pinch off a walnut-sized piece of dough once kneading has finished. Roll dough piece into a snake about 2 1/2 inches long. Form a tear drop shape, lightly pressing the two ends together to seal them into a ring. Repeat with remaining dough.

Turn down the boiling water to a low boil. Drop taralli into the water a few at a time. Do not stir; they will sink at first, then begin to float. Remove floating taralli with a slotted spoon. Place them on the clean cloth and continue until all the taralli have boiled and are drained on the cloth. Place them on the prepared baking sheet.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Bake in the preheated oven until taralli are golden and firm on the outside, but still soft on the inside, about 40 minutes. Cool completely and rest for at least 1 hour before serving. Wrap with a clean cloth or place in a paper bag; store at room temperature for up to 1 week.

avocado-mousse-argiro.name: Avocado Mousse

ingredients.item: 3 very mature and soft avocado cut into pieces
1⁄2 cup of low fat milk cream
3 very mature and soft avocado cut into pieces
1⁄2 cup of low fat milk cream

instructions: It is very basic that avocado is very mature and very soft so that the mousse has a velvety texture. If it's harder it won't melt the avocado and it won't be the mousse smooth and uniform.
See here how to make avocado mature faster and how to chop it up easily and quickly.
Put all the actors in the blender and beat until the mixture becomes uniform, and the light mousse is formed.
Balance with a spoon in high glasses.
Serve immediately or even cooler than the refrigerator.
